issue.title: sandbox.co
issue.body:
**Issue type:** Incorrectly blocked domain (false positive in AdGuard DNS server-side filtering)

**Domains affected:** `sandbox.co` and `api.sandbox.co` (whole-domain block)

**What happens:** AdGuard public DNS sinkholes both hosts to the block page on the Default AND Family Protection servers, while the Non-filtering server resolves them correctly:

```
$ dig sandbox.co @94.140.14.14 +short    # AdGuard DNS Default
94.140.14.33
$ dig sandbox.co @94.140.14.140 +short   # AdGuard non-filtering
172.67.208.122
104.21.91.22

$ dig api.sandbox.co @94.140.14.14 +short
94.140.14.33
$ dig api.sandbox.co @94.140.14.140 +short
104.21.91.22
172.67.208.122
```
(94.140.14.33 = ad-block.dns.adguard.com block page; captured 2026-07-07)

**Why this is a false positive:** sandbox.co hosts **Sandbox**, a legitimate B2B SaaS platform (go-to-market workspaces), served via Cloudflare. `api.sandbox.co` is its REST API — blocking it breaks the application entirely for AdGuard DNS users. The domain appears in **none** of the public filter lists AdGuard aggregates (checked the AdGuardSDNSFilter build and all Hostlists Registry lists, plus oisd/HaGeZi/StevenBlack/EasyList/URLhaus/OpenPhish — zero exact-domain hits), so the block appears to come from AdGuard's server-side dangerous/parked-domains database.

The likely cause is **stale reputation**: the domain was a parked ad page for years (~2019-2025) and was acquired and relaunched as this product in early 2026. McAfee TrustedSource had the same stale "Parked Domain" classification; recategorization requests have been filed there as well. Google Safe Browsing and Norton SafeWeb both rate the domain clean, and the former wildcard DNS record is gone.

**Request:** please remove `sandbox.co` (and subdomains) from the DNS filtering database or recategorize it as a legitimate business/SaaS domain.

(Attempted to file via reports.adguard.com but the screenshot upload step repeatedly failed with "Something went wrong", so filing directly — the dig transcript above is the full repro.)
